I’m Melissa! 2M+ YouTube
Clean smarter. Live better. Waste less time.
Real-life cleaning tips from an accidental cleaning expert 
👇 Links

CLEAN MY SPACE SERVICES! Many of you know I have a cleaning company that operates in Toronto and has been around since 2006. In this little clip I share some info about my service company because I get asked about it SO MUCH and I rarely talk about it here!
.
We do take on new clients in Toronto proper and you can reach us at 416-619-4940.
.
🏆We have won several @homestars awards for best in class.
🧍‍♀️🧍🧍‍♂️ our staff are THE BEST. We train them, vet them carefully, and make sure they are happy at work. They are amazing at keeping up with our covid protocols, too.
🏠🏢🏫we clean homes, condos and offices.
.
Got any questions? Leave them below! And if you did want to 
book you can call or visit our website, cleanmyspace.ca. #toronto #torontocleaning #torontocleaningservice #torontocleaningcompany

Sunday scaries are the REAL DEAL. 

I will say, having a clean and organized house helps me feel ready to tackle the work week. 

Do you have a go to spot you like to clean before Monday morning approaches? 

#sundayscaries #cleanhomehappyhome #getorganized #cleaningmotivation

I need to know .. would you be happy with a brand new vacuum as a holiday gift? 

Give me a 👍🏼 or 👎🏼 down below!

If a vacuum isn’t up your friends or family’s alley, check out our full gift guide (link in bio!) for 24 other AMAZING ideas. 

#holidayshopping #holidaygiftguide #cleaningexpert

I’ve always been into hand and nail care, and using products that keep my nails healthy and strong is super important to me. With the cold weather upon us here in 🇨🇦, I notice that my nails can become weak and brittle if I’m not treating them well. 

Did you know that lavender and tea tree essential oils might be able to help?

I’d love to hear if you’ve tried this tip before. Let me know in the comments below 💅🏼 

#nailcaretips #expertadvice #essentialoils

Is your jewelry looking a little dull or lacklustre lately? If so, I’ve got a quick and easy tip to get it sparkling again.

Take 1/2 cup of rubbing alcohol and pour it into a bowl with a small squirt of dish soap. Put your gold or silver jewelry into the solution and give it a gentle stir. Let it sit for a few minutes and then give it a GOOD rinse with warm water!

**As with any cleaning product you try for the first time, you want to use an abundance of caution to be sure you won’t damage your stuff! Rubbing alcohol should only be used on solid gold, silver and stones.  Never on costume jewelry or pearls. If you’re unsure if your jewelry can withstand the alcoholic stick to mild dish soap and water only**

#expertadvice #jewelrycleaning #diycleaning

With so many cleaning products available, it’s often difficult to decide which ones you need to buy and which ones you can safely (and effectively!) make on your own. 

I want to share with you 3 DIY recipes that I make all of the time, and use to clean 80% of my home with. Check out our latest video (link in bio!) to learn more. 

#diy #cleaningexpert #expertadvice #cleanhomecleanmind

latestPosts.caption:
Comment BUG and I’ll send you this link! Now I KNOW this looks ridiculous but it keeps ticks, mosquitoes, and other winged and multi-legged bugs off you 100%. So if you’re gardening, doing yard work, picking fruit, fishing or camping, this silly looking thing is your best friend. I wear this when I have to do yard work and it feels great taking it off knowing I’ve got nothing to worry about (besides my dignity). 

FOLLOW for more great cleaning finds, ideas, tips and tricks!

#cleanmyspace

No one wants mosquitoes in their yard. And every summer it seems like THEY GET WORSE! Comment MOS and I’ll send it to your DMs!

This small and SAFE donut kills mosquito and black fly  larvae for up to 30 days and quells the population. Create this exact bucket, or plop a donut in a bird bath, rain barrel or any other standing water you have outdoors. It won’t affect birds, fish or pollinators. You heard it here first!

And follow for more great cleaning tips, ideas and finds! #cleanmyspace #bugs #mosquitoes bucket of doom

#AD You can have a clean toilet with barely any effort. I didn’t believe it either and I’m a 2-decades-deep cleaning expert. The new Easy Peasy™ Foaming Toilet Cleaner from Scrubbing Bubbles just launched in Canada, and I want this soft life for all of us — a bowl that stays clean between deep cleans with minimal effort. Here’s the whole job: grip it, rip it, sprinkle into the bowl (not the tank), let it foam, flush. That’s it- simple.

The part that got me extra excited? It knocks out odours while it foams. For super tough stains, light scrubbing may be required — but this does the heavy lifting for you.

🇨🇦 In Canada you can pick it up at Walmart, Fortinos, Superstore, Shoppers Drug Mart, Metro, Sobeys, Freshco, Home Depot, Jean Coutu, and Amazon. @ScrubbingBubblesCanada #EasyPeasy #ScrubbingBubbles #BathroomCleaning SoftLife #CleanMySpace

I want you to feel this in your bones. Perfection serves no one, it gets us stuck and keeps us from trying, failing, course-correcting and getting ahead. Push through the discomfort of not being ‘perfect’ at keeping your home clean, and instead DO WHAT YOU CAN today and appreciate the 💩 out of yourself for trying! 

✅Save this for when you need a pep talk. I gotchu! ❤️

✅Follow for more cleaning motovation and ideas #cleanmyspace

latestPosts.caption: YIKESSSSS. Packing for overnight camp is INSANITY! This mess is stressing me out but I know it’s temporary (and the chaos is somewhat organized?!). Can you relate?

‼️The best dang mop on the planet. Period. End of sentence. Comment MOP and I’ll send this to your DMs (you can also tap the reel and find the link there)! It’s a taco-shaped mop that looks a little funny but cleans like nothing you’ve ever tried before. The taco shape evenly distributes pressure so even with a smaller head you get more than double the cleaning effort of a regular mop. It replaces a bunch of other cleaning tools because you can use it wet or dry, as a high duster, low duster, to clean walls and ceilings, vents and more. It comes with 4 reusable mop pads too, it’s won awards and once you try it, you’ll understand why! I made this mop ;) so I’m biased. But you have to trust me on this one! #mop #makersclean #cleanmyspace @makers.clean

Golf dads will love this for Father’s Day! Comment COOLER and I’ll send you the link!
.
It’s a tube cooler that can hold 7-ish cold cans and keep them that way all round long. Clips onto the bag or slips into a side pocket easily. 
.
For more convenient ideas, like and follow! #cleanmyspace

Pet parents know how bad pet hair can get and there’s a better way to handle it! Comment SHED and I’ll send you the link for this tool (one for cats and one for dogs). Consider brushing your pet outside to reduce the amount of hair and dander that floats around the house, and prepare to be shocked at how much pet hair you’ll be able to remove! #cleanmyspace 

FOLLOW for more cleaning tips, ideas and product recommendations

Comment RINSE and I’ll send it to you!

Since this product came out a few years ago, I’ve changed my laundry routine to include this every single time. I used to recommend vinegar, but it doesn’t compare to the results you get with fabric rinse. Clothes come out cleaner, towels don’t stink, and the rinse also cleans your washer while it works on clothes. You’ve got to try it to see how it works for yourself! #cleanmyspace #downy #laundry @downy - not sponsored just a big fan.

This cooler is also a gorgeous side table. Comment TABLE and I’ll send you the link. If you still have that moldy cooler you bring out for backyard gatherings this is a nice summer upgrade that is built to last. It’s made from a stone resin and can withstand extreme temperatures so you don’t need to bring it in during the off season (mine has sat outside all Canadian winter long). I’ve had this for over a year now and I’m totally obsessed. It holds over 50 cans and is super solid!

FOLLOW for more great cleaning and home finds and ideas #cleanmyspace

No joke this has been my ride or die stain remover for YEARS now and it never lets me down. Comment STAIN and I’ll send you a link to order it.

Can you imagine? Like to never have a stain you can’t conquer again? It’s a goooooood feeling.
#laundry #stains #stainremoval #cleanmyspace cleaningexpert

We have ALL had days that make us feel crummy for one reason or another, and the to top it off, we come home to a bunch of stuff that needs cleaning, folding or our attention and it can feel like it never ends. I want to remind you that even if you did something *really* small today, go ahead and celebrate that. You unloaded your dishwasher this am? Amazing! You folded some clothes that were on your bed? Perfect. You emptied the trash? Yeah!!! I know these seem small, but on days that feel overwhelming these can feel like a lot of work to expend mental and physical energy on and celebrating that tiny win will make you feel better. And you know what? WHY NOT? Why not compliment yourself on something when your day felt hard?

👉 Follow for more cleaning advice, tips and motivation #cleanmyspace
